_rules.contract: upcasters are pure vN->vN+1 functions applied at fold time; stored bytes never change (versioning.md M3); readers must-ignore unknown fields

cases.name: additive-field-identity
cases.note: v2 added optional field lang; upcast of a v1 payload is identity

cases.name: shape-migration
cases.note: illustrative shape migration: string reason becomes an object; the v1 event folds forever via this function
